title: Know the RiskBefore You Route
text:
|:| llano
    Know the RiskBefore You Route
    Route safety scoring for trucking fleets. Real crash history, live weather, and road geometry — ranked alternatives in a single API call.
    
      Try the Demo
      API Docs →
    
  






  
    THE PROBLEM
    Nuclear Verdicts Have Changed the Game
    
      
        $22M
        Median nuclear verdict in a trucking case.Up from under $1M two decades ago.
      
      
        
          Juries reward foreseeability
          The new standard: "You had GPS data, weather forecasts, and crash history. Why did you dispatch on that route, at that hour, in those conditions?" Plaintiffs' attorneys are already making this argument.
        
        
          Safety programs miss routing
          Dashcams, ELD compliance, driver scoring — the industry has invested heavily in monitoring drivers. Route choice remains unscored and undocumented.
        
        
          Llano gives you the paper trail
          Every dispatch is scored, ranked, and logged. If the worst happens, you can show the routes you considered, the scores you saw, and the choice you made.
        
      
    
  






  
    HOW IT WORKS
    From Route to Risk Score
    A statistical model fit to a decade of TXDOT crash records, adjusted in real time for weather and departure time.
    
      
        01 — BASELINE
        Crash rate per segment
        A mixed-effects negative binomial model estimates expected crashes per vehicle-mile on every road segment in Texas — controlling for road class, geometry, and urban density.
      
      
        02 — WEATHER
        Real-time multiplier
        An XGBoost case-crossover model estimates how current conditions (temperature, wind, precipitation) elevate crash probability relative to the same segment on a clear day.
      
      
        03 — OUTPUT
        Trips per crash, ranked
        Alternatives are scored and ranked by expected trips between crashes. The safest route is returned first, with hotspot locations and a weather multiplier for each alternative.
      
    
  






  
    LIVE DEMO
    Try It — Texas Routes
    Type a llano score command below. Geocoding and routing are live.

    

      
      
        
          
          
          
          |:| llano — demo
        
        
        
          $
          
        
      

      
      
        
        enter a route to see it mapped
      

    

    
      Flags:  --from  --to  --via
       --arrive "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM"  --depart "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM"
       --alts N
    
  






  
    SAFETY AUDIT
    Built for the Broker
    Auto-generated quarterly reports your fleet can hand directly to underwriters — third-party scored, not self-reported.
    

      
        
          
          
          
          acme-logistics-safety-audit-q1-2026.pdf
        
        
          
            |:| llano
            
              Fleet Safety Audit Report
              Q1 2026 · January 1 – March 31
            
          
          
            Acme Logistics Inc.
            Generated April 2, 2026
          
          
            71/100
            
              Good
              ↑ +4 pts vs Q4 2025
            
            Overall Safety Score
          
          
            4,821Routes Scored
            87%Compliance Rate
            2.1MMiles Covered
          
          FACTOR BREAKDOWN
          
            
              Weather Exposure
              
              74
            
            
              Road Quality
              
              81
            
            
              Traffic
              
              58
            
            
              Incident History
              
              79
            
          
          
            
              
              Certified by Llano · Third-party scored · Not self-reported
            
            p. 1 of 8
          
        
      

      
        
          📋
          
            Insurer-Ready Format
            Third-party certified scores and methodology summaries designed to satisfy underwriter requirements — not self-reported safety claims.
          
        
        
          📈
          
            Trend Over Time
            Quarterly safety score history and period-over-period improvement give insurers the longitudinal data they need to price risk accurately.
          
        
        
          ✅
          
            Compliance Tracking
            Track how often dispatchers act on Llano recommendations. Demonstrated safety culture is more credible than any self-reported metric.
          
        
        
          📍
          
            Hotspot Attribution
            Recurring risk concentrations mapped across your full route network — with incident correlation that builds actuarial credibility over time.
          
        
      

    
  






  
    API
    One Endpoint
    POST your waypoints, get back ranked routes with safety scores, hotspots, and weather multipliers.
    
      
        
          
          POST api.llano.io/score
        
        // Request
{
  "waypoints": [
    [-99.5075, 27.5035],  // Laredo
    [-98.4936, 29.4241]   // San Antonio
  ],
  "arrive": "2026-04-20T18:00",
  "alternatives": 3
}

// Response (array, safest first)
[{
  "name":           "I-35 N",
  "trips_per_crash": 2841,
  "duration_secs":   9540,
  "wx_mult":         1.04,
  "hotspots":        [...],
  "route":           { /* GeoJSON */ }
}, ...]
      

      
        RESPONSE FIELDS
        
          trips_per_crash
          number
          Expected trips between crashes on this route at this time. Higher is safer. Ranked descending.
        
        
          wx_mult
          number
          Weather multiplier on crash probability. 1.0 = clear conditions baseline. Values above 1.0 indicate elevated risk from current conditions.
        
        
          hotspots
          array
          High-risk segments along the route — each with a route fraction (0–1) and contributing factors.
        
        
          route
          GeoJSON
          LineString geometry for the route, suitable for rendering in any mapping library.
        
        
          Request API access →
        
      
    
  




  
    
      Ready to score your routes?
      Llano is in early access. Texas coverage available today.
    
    
      Get Early Access

title: Llano
text:
|:| llano — route safety scoring
    Texas routes only  ·  llano score --from "..." --to "..." --arrive "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM"
  

  
    
      
      
      
      |:| llano — demo
    
    
    
      $
      
    
  

  
    
  

  
    Supported flags:  
    --from  
    --to  
    --via  
    --depart "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM"  
    --arrive "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM"  
    --alts N
